question_frequency.rationale: The Tutor asks no didactic questions of the user. All questioning flows from the student to the tutor; the tutor simply provides solutions and answers.

question_quality.rationale: No choices or forks are framed for the user. The tutor presents the sorted-key insight as fait accompli and offers the count-tuple variant without inviting the user to reason about the trade-off.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding — the full solution, complexity, and bonus variant are dumped in turn 1. The student is left to ask their own follow-up questions rather than being led through discovery.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and the answers to the student's three questions are accurate and useful (including the honest correction about preferring `''.join`). But the dynamic is one-way Q&A, not collaborative pair-programming.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
